name: agentgate-poc
description: AgentGate POC: deterministic pre-release validation for agent extensions.

scripts.validate: node scripts/agentgate.mjs validate --target targets/filesystem.mcp.json --scenarios scenarios/filesystem --out runs/latest
scripts.demo:unsafe: node scripts/agentgate.mjs validate --target targets/filesystem-too-broad.mcp.json --scenarios scenarios/filesystem --out runs/unsafe-demo --expect fail
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && npm run demo && npm run demo:unsafe
